param.value: "Verify the Home page for an user without Sign in"
"Verify that user is able to view options for "Data Structures" dropdown on home page without Sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Arrays"without sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Linked List"without sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Stack"without sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Queue"without sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Tree"without sign in"
"Verify user is on home page and click on dropdown "Graph"without sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Data Structures-Introduction on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Array on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Linked List on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Stack on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Queue on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Tree on the home page without Sign in"
"Verify that user able to see warning message on clicking Get Started buttons of Graph on the home page without Sign in"
"verify user able to navigate registration page"
